## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| PrivateEndpointService/Create | (CreatePrivateEndpointRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/endpoints |
| PrivateEndpointService/Delete | (DeletePrivateEndpointRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /vpc/v1/endpoints/{private_endpoint_id} |
| PrivateEndpointService/Get | (GetPrivateEndpointRequest) → PrivateEndpoint | GET /vpc/v1/endpoints/{private_endpoint_id} |
| PrivateEndpointService/List | (ListPrivateEndpointsRequest) → ListPrivateEndpointsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/endpoints |
| PrivateEndpointService/ListOperations | (ListPrivateEndpointOperationsRequest) → ListPrivateEndpointOperationsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/endpoints/{private_endpoint_id}/operations |
| PrivateEndpointService/Update | (UpdatePrivateEndpointRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /vpc/v1/endpoints/{private_endpoint_id} |
